---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new hx capability, workflow improvement, or docs enhancement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested capability.

## Problem

What current limitation or friction does this address?

## Proposed Shape

- affected CLI command, MCP tool, doc, or policy area:
- affected cells, ports, or proof flow, if relevant:
- expected safety or governance impact:

## Acceptance Signals

How would we know this is done?

## Risks or Tradeoffs

Call out any effect on:

- locality enforcement
- proof burden
- replay or audit behavior
- benchmark interpretation
- metric meaning
